name: Placeholder Image API
tagline: Generate custom placeholder images with text, gradients & categories in SVG/PNG
description:
Generate beautiful placeholder images on-the-fly for your web projects, mockups, and prototypes.

**Features:**
- Custom width & height (up to 4000x4000)
- Text overlay with configurable font, size, and color
- 10 stunning gradient background presets (blue, sunset, ocean, forest, fire, purple, dark, sky, peach, mint)
- Custom gradient colors (any hex color pair)
- 8 category presets (avatar, banner, thumbnail, product, hero, card, icon, cover)
- SVG and PNG output formats
- Auto-sized text based on image dimensions
- CORS-enabled for browser use
- Lightning-fast edge delivery via Cloudflare

**Use Cases:**
- Web development placeholders
- UI/UX mockups and wireframes
- Social media image templates
- Email template previews
- App development prototyping
- Dynamic OG images
